channel.title: Salman Muqtadir
channel.description: Unofficial RSS feed for Salman Muqtadir

item.title: No more dirty toilets and cheap props. Welcome to the first ever 5star productio...
item.description: No more dirty toilets and cheap props. Welcome to the first ever 5star production studio of bangladesh Brownfish Studio looks forward to changing the industry. the dream place for actors, models, influencers & singers ! * Kids friendly space with nanny for artists who are parents * separate clean toilets for male and female. * biggest props inventory in the country * Vip Powder room with personal changing room and toilet * Free wifi * Cafeteria for coffee and snacks * Rest, nap & shower facility * Only studio in bangladesh with Modular sets and backdrops * In house Production team for music and videos available * In house agency for creative solution available * In house recording studio for dubbing, music or jingles * Bangladesh's only car friendly studio with 2 in house parkings * In house hair dresser available * In house make up artist available * Meeting room * Natural sun light access for unbeatable soft lit shoots * waiting area and reception * Marketing solutions, Grooming & training available for ambitious new comers. Opening soon for everyone after EID !
